mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO social_friendship (user_low_id, user_high_id) VALUES (#{userLowId}, #{userHighId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM social_friendship WHERE user_low_id = #{userLowId} AND user_high_id = #{userHighId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM social_friendship WHERE user_low_id = #{userLowId} AND user_high_id = #{userHighId}
mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS peerUserId, u.nickname AS nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, u.gender AS gender, u.elo_score AS eloScore, u.title_name AS titleName, COALESCE(r.remark, '') AS remark FROM social_friendship f INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = CASE WHEN f.user_low_id = #{userId} THEN f.user_high_id ELSE f.user_low_id END LEFT JOIN social_friend_remark r ON r.owner_user_id = #{userId} AND r.peer_user_id = u.id WHERE f.user_low_id = #{userId} OR f.user_high_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
